ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., Nonprofit Organization, Private) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the company */,
  "competitors" TEXT /* Competitors of the company */,
  "easy_apply" INTEGER /* Whether the job posting allows easy apply */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "min_salary" INTEGER /* Minimum salary for the job */,
  "max_salary" INTEGER /* Maximum salary for the job */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the job */,
  "job_state" TEXT /* State where the job is located */,
  "same_state" INTEGER /* Whether the company is located in the same state as the job */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the company */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "apply_url" TEXT /* URL where users can apply for the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, Internship) */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Minimum experience required for the job */,
  "education_requirement" TEXT /* Minimum education level required for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the company for the job */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying to the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_ownership_type FOREIGN KEY ("ownership_type") REFERENCES ownership_types ("ownership_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_revenue FOREIGN KEY ("revenue") REFERENCES revenues ("revenue_range"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., Nonprofit Organization, Private) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue of the company */,
  "competitors" TEXT /* Competitors of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Company's mission statement */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the company */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the company's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_revenue FOREIGN KEY ("revenue") REFERENCES revenues ("revenue_range"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_headquarters FOREIGN KEY ("headquarters") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_ownership_type FOREIGN KEY ("ownership_type") REFERENCES ownership_types ("ownership_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenues" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue range */,
  "revenue_range" TEXT /* Range of revenue (e.g., 100 - 500 million) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_types" (
  "ownership_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership type */,
  "ownership_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ownership type (e.g., Nonprofit Organization, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saved_jobs" (
  "saved_job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saved job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the job */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that was saved */,
  "saved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job was saved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saved_job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saved_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saved_jobs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query used for the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search (e.g., Job, Company) */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of search results returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_ranges" (
  "salary_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary range */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job */,
  "min_salary" INTEGER /* Minimum salary for the job */,
  "max_salary" INTEGER /* Maximum salary for the job */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the job */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the salary range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_ranges_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies_competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "competitor_description" TEXT /* Description of the competitor */,
  "competitor_url" TEXT /* URL of the competitor's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_competitors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "is_headquarters" INTEGER /* Whether the location is the company's headquarters */,
  "is_main_office" INTEGER /* Whether the location is a main office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "is_primary_industry" INTEGER /* Whether the industry is the primary industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id", "company_id")
)
